hero.title: Engagement models that fit your ambition.
hero.description: Whether a fast pilot sprint or a long-term partnership — we work in clear, predictable models. No hidden costs.

tiers.name: Sprint
tiers.description: A focused pilot sprint to prove AI potential on real data.

tiers.name: Build
tiers.description: From prototype to production system — securely integrated and shipped.

tiers.name: Partner
tiers.description: Your long-term AI team for continuous development and operations.

items.q: Why a fixed price for the sprint?
items.a: Because the scope is clearly defined. You carry no risk and know exactly what you get.

items.q: What's included in the Build model?
items.a: Everything from production-ready development through integration and testing to training and post go-live support.

items.q: Can we start small and scale later?
items.a: That's exactly what the sprint is for. Many clients start there and then move to Build or Partner.
Only for operations, hosting and optional support — transparently listed and agreed upfront.
